subject: Nov 19 charter quote - Cedar Ridge
snippet: Here is the quote for your November 19 charter ...
body:
Hi Callum,

Thanks for the call. Here is the quote for your November 19 charter, Eugene to Portland and return, one 56-seat coach with driver for the full day.

Quoted total: $620.00 round trip. Reference CCL-44192.

To hold the November 19 date we ask for a $200.00 deposit. Just reply to authorize and we will run the card you have on file with us today, the balance is due after the trip.

Thanks,
Dispatch, Cascade Coach Lines

subject: Revised group quote - Cedar Ridge Middle (Nov 19)
snippet: Attached is your revised group education quote ...
body:
Hello Callum,

Attached is your REVISED group education quote, reference OHS-EDU-2026-1187. This supersedes the quote we sent on September 26. The per-student pricing and the group minimum are on the attached sheet, please use the revised sheet. Your morning slot on November 19 is held. We need your final cleared headcount by November 12.

Warmly,
Education Office, Oregon Historical Society

subject: October family newsletter
body:
Cedar Ridge families, a reminder that picture retakes are October 14 and the fall book fair runs the last week of October. Volunteers welcome.

Front Office

subject: Your weekly running recap
body:
Nice work this week Callum. You logged 4 runs for 22.4 miles, including a long run on Spencer Butte. Your weekly streak is intact.

Strava

subject: Order confirmed

body:
Your order is confirmed. The Coalfield Dispatches ships within two business days to your Blair Boulevard address. Thanks for supporting a local shop.
